userId.description: Unique identifier of the user (matching Firebase Auth UID)

displayName.description: Display name of the user from their Google provider profile

Win.title: Win
Win.description: A single daily achievement or small victory recorded by a user

id.description: A unique id for the win

text.description: The description or text of the achievement

date.description: The calendar date associated with the win (YYYY-MM-DD)

createdAt.description: The timestamp showing when this win was created

Thought.title: Thought
Thought.description: A rough or difficult thought that was mended with gold (Kintsugi)

id.description: A unique id for the thought

text.description: The heavy or difficult thought text

timestamp.description: The millisecond timestamp when the thought occurred

createdAt.description: The timestamp showing when this thought was created in Firestore

/users/{userId}/wins/{winId}.description: Subcollection storing the user's daily small victories

/users/{userId}/thoughts/{thoughtId}.description: Subcollection storing the user's heavy thoughts (things to let go)
